title: lappula stricta
intro: Lappula stricta, also known as the strict delphinium or needle spurge, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lappula stricta include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various skin and respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Lappula stricta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
